interest: Scroll-stopping AI stories for a broad Instagram audience -- the kind a non-expert stops on, watches to the end, and sends to a friend. Strongly prefer concrete, recent, visually demonstrable AI you could film: new models, apps, tools, gadgets, robots, jaw-dropping demos, and creative or surprising uses people can SEE or try right now. Favor an emotional pull -- awe, curiosity, 'wait, that's real?', or obvious everyday usefulness -- and a clear visual. Avoid technical, academic, math-heavy, benchmark-only, or incremental research, and anything that needs jargon to land.
